zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续整理上行
zh.content:
整体趋势维持震荡上行格局，价格运行于日内高位区域，短线多头仍占优势，但上攻动能略显放缓，结构上保持强势整理形态，尚未出现明显反转信号

MACD维持正值运行，动能柱偏多，显示多头趋势延续；价格站稳SMA20上方，均线支撑有效，但需关注量能配合情况变化持续性确认稳健配置略

上方阻力关注6.63-6.65区间，突破则打开上行空间；下方支撑位于6.61及SMA20附近，短线需警惕假突破风险控制仓位

操作建议以回踩低吸为主，若放量突破6.65可顺势加仓，跌破6.61则止损观望，整体以震荡偏多思路对待严格执行风控纪律避免追高

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading around 6.6262 with a very tight 24-hour range between 6.6107 and 6.6345, indicating a consolidation phase with subdued volatility. Price remains slightly above the 20-period SMA at 6.42868, which preserves a mild bullish structural bias in the short term. However, the inability to extend beyond the recent highs suggests buyer hesitation. Market conditions reflect equilibrium after a prior move, with participants awaiting a clearer directional catalyst.

The MACD reading at 0.05675 indicates weak bullish momentum, though the absence of a defined signal line and RSI limits confirmation strength. Momentum appears to be flattening rather than accelerating, suggesting that upside pressure is stabilizing instead of expanding. This behavior is typical in tight ranges where neither buyers nor sellers are able to gain decisive control. As a result, signals should be interpreted as mildly constructive but not strongly trending.

Immediate support is established near 6.60, aligning with the lower boundary of the current consolidation range. A deeper structural support lies at the 20-period SMA around 6.43, which would represent a broader mean-reversion zone if price breaks lower. On the upside, resistance is positioned at 6.63–6.64, marking the recent intraday high, followed by a psychological barrier near 6.70 where selling interest may intensify.

Given the current compression, range-bound strategies remain most appropriate. Long entries can be considered near 6.60 with tight risk control below 6.55, targeting a move back toward 6.63–6.70. Alternatively, a confirmed breakout above 6.64 accompanied by stronger volume would signal renewed bullish expansion toward 6.75 or higher. Failure to hold 6.60 would weaken the structure and expose a decline toward 6.43 support.
